name: Tomatoes Stuffed with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon butter or other melted fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the large shrimp in half.
2. Wash the tomatoes and remove stem ends and centers; sprinkle with salt.
3. In a bowl, combine rice, cheese, beaten egg, salt, pepper, and shrimp.
4. Place the mixture into the tomatoes.
5. In another bowl, mix butter and bread crumbs.
6. Sprinkle the butter and crumb mixture over the top of the tomatoes.
7. Place the assembled tomatoes in a well-greased baking dish.
8. Bake in a moderate oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes or until the tomatoes are tender.
9. Serves 6.
